\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3857 introduces Spectral Gap Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Delta\phi(s) := \pi\,\delta(s) = \pi(s-1), \end{equation}
